name: MISOGYNY.EXE
description: Autonomous anti-misogyny art bot. Scrapes misogynistic quotes from Reddit, generates typographic artwork with kinetic animations, mints NFTs on Ethereum via Rare Protocol. Operator approves roasts at scrape time via Telegram; the roast fires instantly on sale, inscribed permanently on-chain. Revenue split on-chain via SplitGuard (50/30/20 — Refuge UK / artist / project). Runs unattended on a Raspberry Pi every 12 hours.
operator_wallet: BOT_ADDRESS — set per deployment, stored in .env on the Pi; DEPLOYER_A/DEPLOYER_B/TREASURY wallets are operator-side, not on the Pi.

erc8004_registrations.label: MISOGYNY.EXE
erc8004_registrations.purpose: Autonomous content curation, art generation, NFT minting, and charity revenue splitting

supported_tools.name: reddit_api
supported_tools.purpose: Scrape 16 subreddits + 10 search queries via residential IP

supported_tools.name: claude_haiku_4_5
supported_tools.purpose: Scraper extraction + guard verifier + roast picker

supported_tools.name: content_sanitizer
supported_tools.purpose: Regex-based PII / injection / code filtering before any AI call

supported_tools.name: telegram_bot_api
supported_tools.purpose: Operator approval flow at scrape time (pick 1/2/3 roast, regen cap 3, 72h expiry, weekly digest)

supported_tools.name: pinata_ipfs
supported_tools.purpose: Pin PNG + HTML + metadata (NOT MP4 — MP4 is Bluesky-only)

supported_tools.name: ethereum_rpc
supported_tools.purpose: Mint via CollectionAdmin, list via SplitGuard, register quotes + inscribe comebacks on QuoteRegistry

supported_tools.name: rare_protocol_bazaar
supported_tools.purpose: Auction mechanism; invoked via SplitGuard immutable wrapper

supported_tools.name: bluesky_atproto
supported_tools.purpose: Post MP4 of mint + MP4 of redemption glitch animation

supported_tools.name: puppeteer_ffmpeg
supported_tools.purpose: Capture HTML animation to MP4 for Bluesky (800x800 / 30fps / H.264 yuv420p)

supported_tools.name: viem
supported_tools.purpose: Contract interaction, tx receipt parsing, Transfer-event tokenId extraction

steps: SCRAPE: Fetch posts from 16 subreddits + 10 search queries via residential IP
GUARD Layer 1: Content sanitizer — regex filters for URLs, PII, wallets, code, HTML, injection
GUARD Layer 2: AI verifier — separate Haiku call confirms genuine misogyny, rejects satire / irony / incitement
ROAST (Sonnet x3): Generate three roast candidates in parallel
PICK (Haiku): Choose a 'recommended' roast; operator sees all three in Telegram
APPROVE (Telegram): Operator picks 1/2/3 or regenerates (cap 3) or rejects. 72h expiry with 48h nag.
QUEUE: HMAC-sign {id, quote, roast} into the mint queue
MINT: CollectionAdmin.mint(uri, quote) via viem — token lands in SplitGuard directly
LIST: SplitGuard.listAuction(tokenId, price, duration) — splits are immutable in bytecode
CAPTURE: Puppeteer + ffmpeg renders the HTML to MP4 (Bluesky only)
INDEX (every 5 min): Watch Rare Bazaar for Sold / AuctionSettled events on our collection
REDEEM (on sale): Load pre-approved roast from queue, generate glitch animation (hate → roast), update tokenURI + inscribe comeback on-chain, post MP4 + PNG to Bluesky

safety_guardrails.hmac_queue_integrity: MANDATORY — QUEUE_HMAC_SECRET env var, >=32 chars, no fallback. Covers {id, quote, roast}.
safety_guardrails.anthropic_daily_usd_cap: ANTHROPIC_DAILY_USD_CAP env var, default $10 — aborts cycle on exceed
safety_guardrails.note_phase_4_defaults: daily_mint_cap=2 and max_per_cycle=1 are the Phase 4 stabilization values (first 30 days). After soak, operator may crank to 12 and 3 respectively per spec §8 / §18.

primary_splitter.note: Addresses baked into splitter constructor — immutable after deploy. SplitGuard hardcodes [splitterAddress, 100] into bytecode so proceeds always route here.

secondary_splitter.note: Set as the EIP-2981 royalty receiver on the Rare collection. Receives 15% (or whatever Rare Bazaar enforces) on secondary sales.

compute_budget.anthropic_per_cycle_estimate: $0.05 — 3 Sonnet roasts + 1 Haiku picker + guard calls
compute_budget.gas_per_mint: ~0.00004 ETH at current Ethereum gas prices (combined CollectionAdmin.mint + QuoteRegistry.registerQuote + SplitGuard.listAuction)
compute_budget.monthly_cost_estimate: ~$5 at phase-4 cadence (2 approvals/day, not all minted)
compute_budget.rate_limiting: Reddit: 1500ms delay + 3 retries with exponential backoff on 429

contracts_v6.note: Actual deployed addresses populated per-environment in .env. See docs/v6-spec.md §7 for architecture.
contracts_v6.rare_collection: RARE_CONTRACT_ADDRESS — deployed via `rare deploy erc721`, owned by CollectionAdmin after cutover
contracts_v6.collection_admin: COLLECTION_ADMIN_ADDRESS — wrapper around Rare collection. Hardcodes mint destination to SplitGuard. Owner = DEPLOYER_A.
contracts_v6.quote_registry: QUOTE_REGISTRY_ADDRESS — stores quoteOf + comebackOf on-chain. Owner = DEPLOYER_B.
contracts_v6.split_guard: SPLIT_GUARD_ADDRESS — immutable wrapper baking [primary_splitter, 100] into bytecode. emergencyWithdraw destination hardcoded to TREASURY.

contracts_v3_legacy.note: V3 remains LIVE on Base mainnet. Do NOT touch until explicitly retired. V6 runs independently on Ethereum with no shared infra.
